category_sources: Official about page https://programming-nu.github.io/about says Nu is an interpreted object-oriented language with Lisp syntax.
source_facts.description says Object-oriented, Lisp-like programming language.
display_name_sources: Official about page https://programming-nu.github.io/about names the language Nu.
docs_sources: Official about page https://programming-nu.github.io/about lists Documentation links including Installing Nu, Using Nu, Embedding Nu, Nu Reference, Syntax, Operators, Types, and Class Reference.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/programming-nu/nu; per instructions repo returned as null.
tags_sources: Official about page https://programming-nu.github.io/about says Nu is implemented in Objective-C and designed for Objective-C runtime interoperability.
source_facts.description says object-oriented, Lisp-like programming language.
